src/accessDeep.ts.summary: Navigates and mutates nested values (objects, arrays, Maps, Sets) at a given decoded path.
src/accessDeep.ts.inputs: A root object/value and a path array of string/number segments; a mapper function for writes.
src/accessDeep.ts.outputs: getDeep (reads value at path) and setDeep (applies mapper at path, returns mutated root).
src/accessDeep.ts.should: Traverse Map/Set via numeric row/key-value indexing, validate paths, and apply mappers in place.
src/accessDeep.ts.shouldNot: Parse or stringify path strings, know about type annotations, or perform serialization logic.

src/class-registry.ts.summary: Registry mapping user classes to identifiers plus an optional allow-list of serializable props.
src/class-registry.ts.outputs: ClassRegistry class with register and getAllowedProps.
src/class-registry.ts.should: Extend Registry using class name as default id, track per-class allowed prop lists.
src/class-registry.ts.shouldNot: Serialize/deserialize instances or apply transformation rules; only stores registration data.

src/custom-transformer-registry.ts.summary: Registry of user-defined custom transformers keyed by name for arbitrary value serialization.
src/custom-transformer-registry.ts.inputs: CustomTransfomer objects (name, isApplicable, serialize, deserialize) and candidate values.
src/custom-transformer-registry.ts.outputs: CustomTransformerRegistry with register, findApplicable, findByName; CustomTransfomer type.
src/custom-transformer-registry.ts.should: Store transformers by name and locate the first applicable one for a value.
src/custom-transformer-registry.ts.shouldNot: Invoke serialize/deserialize itself or know about built-in type rules; only registers and finds.

src/double-indexed-kv.ts.summary: Bidirectional key/value store allowing lookup in both directions.
src/double-indexed-kv.ts.outputs: DoubleIndexedKV class with set, getByKey, getByValue, clear.
src/double-indexed-kv.ts.should: Maintain two synchronized Maps for forward and reverse lookup.
src/double-indexed-kv.ts.shouldNot: Generate identifiers, apply registration policy, or contain domain-specific logic.

src/index.ts.summary: Public SuperJSON class and entry point orchestrating serialize/deserialize and registries.
src/index.ts.inputs: SuperJSONValue objects to serialize, SuperJSONResult payloads to deserialize, registration calls.
src/index.ts.outputs: Default SuperJSON class, static/instance serialize, deserialize, stringify, parse, register* helpers.
src/index.ts.should: Coordinate walker/plainer, assemble meta annotations, own class/symbol/custom registries and error props.
src/index.ts.shouldNot: Implement low-level transformation rules or path/tree traversal itself; delegates to plainer/transformer.

src/is.ts.summary: Collection of type-guard predicates for runtime type detection.
src/is.ts.outputs: Boolean type-guard functions (isMap, isDate, isPrimitive, isTypedArray, etc.) and TypedArray types.
src/is.ts.should: Return precise type predicates using typeof, instanceof, and Object.prototype.toString.
src/is.ts.shouldNot: Transform values, hold state, or depend on other project modules.

src/pathstringifier.ts.summary: Encodes and decodes property paths to/from dot-delimited strings with escaping.
src/pathstringifier.ts.inputs: String-array paths to stringify; encoded path strings (with legacy flag) to parse.
src/pathstringifier.ts.should: Escape/unescape dots and backslashes, split on unescaped dots, support legacy path mode.
src/pathstringifier.ts.shouldNot: Access or mutate the object graph, or know about type annotations.

src/plainer.ts.summary: Recursively walks a value into a plain JSON tree with annotations and applies them back on deserialize.
src/plainer.ts.inputs: Values to walk, identity maps, a SuperJSON instance, and annotation trees to reverse.
src/plainer.ts.outputs: walker, applyValueAnnotations, applyReferentialEqualityAnnotations, generateReferentialEqualityAnnotations, tree types.
src/plainer.ts.should: Traverse recursively, invoke transformValue, build minimised annotation trees, dedupe/track referential equality, guard prototype pollution.
src/plainer.ts.shouldNot: Define concrete type transformation rules (delegates to transformer) or JSON.stringify the result.

src/registry.ts.summary: Generic identifier<->value registry built on DoubleIndexedKV.
src/registry.ts.inputs: Values plus an identifier generator; optional explicit identifiers.
src/registry.ts.outputs: Registry class with register, clear, getIdentifier, getValue.
src/registry.ts.should: Assign generated or explicit identifiers, avoid duplicate registration, resolve both directions.
src/registry.ts.shouldNot: Encode class- or symbol-specific policy (subclasses add that) or perform serialization.

src/transformer.ts.summary: Defines the built-in and registry-backed transformation rules mapping special types to JSON and back.
src/transformer.ts.inputs: Values, TypeAnnotations, and a SuperJSON instance (for registries and allowed props).
src/transformer.ts.should: Detect and (de)serialize dates, bigints, sets, maps, errors, regexps, URLs, symbols, classes, typed arrays, custom types.
src/transformer.ts.shouldNot: Walk the object tree or manage paths/referential equality; operates on single values only.

src/types.ts.summary: Central TypeScript type definitions for SuperJSON's value, JSON, and result shapes.
src/types.ts.outputs: Class, JSONValue, SuperJSONValue, SuperJSONResult and related interfaces/types.
src/types.ts.should: Declare the type contracts shared across modules.
src/types.ts.shouldNot: Contain runtime logic or executable code.

src/util.ts.summary: Small ES5-safe helper functions over records and arrays.
src/util.ts.inputs: Records/arrays and predicate or callback functions.
src/util.ts.should: Provide iteration/search helpers with fallbacks for missing ES6 methods.
src/util.ts.shouldNot: Hold state or contain any SuperJSON domain logic.
